name: Weixin (WeChat Public Account)
description: WeChat 公众号 / Service Account integration. Outbound via Customer Service Message API (api.weixin.qq.com) with auto-rotated access_token (2-hour TTL, 60s skew). Inbound primitives: SHA1 signature verification + XML parsing. Set WEIXIN_APPID + WEIXIN_SECRET; WEIXIN_TOKEN optional for outbound.
